name: commitsense
description: Enhances AI code suggestions by injecting relevant Git history and blame info directly into the editor as context.

commands.title: CommitSense: Inject Git Context for AI
CommitSense: Show Inline Blame for Selection

commitsense.maxCommits.description: Maximum number of recent commits to fetch and inject.

commitsense.autoInject.description: Automatically inject Git context when a file is opened.

commitsense.showCodeLens.description: Show CodeLens decorations with commit info at the top of files.

commitsense.showHover.description: Show Git blame info in hover tooltips.

commitsense.contextPosition.description: Where to insert the injected context comment block.

commitsense.includeDiff.description: Include a recent diff summary in the injected context block.

commitsense.preferGitLens.description: Use the GitLens extension API when available for richer blame data.

chatParticipants.name: commitsense
chatParticipants.description: Ask questions about the current file with full git history as context. Powered by commit history, blame data, and Copilot.

commands.name: history
commands.description: Show a formatted table of recent commits for the active file

commands.name: blame
commands.description: Explain who changed the current line and why, using commit context

commands.name: suggest
commands.description: Ask Copilot for a suggestion informed by this file's git history

languageModelTools.name: commitsense_getFileHistory
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Fetches the recent commit history for a specific file, returning hashes, authors, dates, and commit messages. Use this whenever you need to understand how a file has evolved, who works on it, or what recent changes were made.

filePath.description: Absolute path to the file to get history for

maxCommits.description: Maximum number of commits to return (default: 10)

languageModelTools.name: commitsense_getLineBlame
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Gets git blame information for a specific line in a file: the commit hash, author, date, and commit message. Use this to understand who last changed a particular line and why.

line.description: 0-based line number to get blame for
